Attacks.Name: Pound
Attacks.Effect: After this attack is resolved, this character gains power equal to the damage dealt.

Attacks.Name: Sludge
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character is given the Poison special condition.

Attacks.Name: Minimize
Attacks.Effect: Until the start of Grimer's next activation, enemy characters subtract 1 die from their attack rolls when targeting Grimer.

Superpowers.Name: Sticky Hold
Superpowers.Effect: This character cannot be pushed or placed by enemy effects.

Superpowers.Name: Poison Touch
Superpowers.Effect: When this character hits with a melee attack, if a wild is rolled, the target also gains the Poison special condition.

Attacks.Name: Sludge Bomb
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character is given the Poison special condition and loses 1 power.

Superpowers.Name: Acid Armor
Superpowers.Effect: Add 2 dice to Grimer's defense rolls until the start of its next activation.

Superpowers.Name: Evolution
Superpowers.Effect: Replace this character with a Muk character of the same injured status. The new character begins with damage equal to the damage on this character and power equal to the power on this character.
